---
title: Installation
sidebar: get-started
---

## Requirements

PaleoBeasts requires Python ≥ 3.12.

## Install from PyPI

```bash
pip install paleobeasts
```

## Install from source

```bash
git clone https://github.com/your-org/PaleoBeasts.git
cd PaleoBeasts
pip install -e .
```

## Conda environment (recommended)

A pre-configured environment file is provided that includes PaleoBeasts
and its full scientific stack including [Pyleoclim](https://pyleoclim-util.readthedocs.io/):

```bash
conda env create -f env_jpl.yml
conda activate pb_env_jpl
```

## Verify the installation

```python
import paleobeasts as pb
print(pb.__version__)
```

## Dependencies

Core dependencies installed automatically with pip:

| Package | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `numpy`, `scipy` | Numerical integration and linear algebra |
| `pandas` | Time-series data handling |
| `matplotlib`, `seaborn` | Plotting |
| `pyleoclim` | Paleoclimate time-series analysis and export |
| `xarray` | Multi-dimensional arrays |
| `statsmodels` | Statistical utilities |
